name: Pawn Max
description_short: Pawn Max (Store 3) is a pawn shop and online resale store offering pre-owned jewelry, electronics, tools, and more with a no-fee layaway plan.
description_long:
Pawn Max operates as Store 3 within the 866 Pawn chain, a multi-location pawn operation identifiable by the 866pawn.com domain. The business maintains a full e-commerce storefront that allows customers to browse and purchase pre-owned inventory online, extending its reach beyond a single physical location. The website is professionally built and includes a product catalog organized by category.

The store's online inventory spans eight merchandise categories: Jewelry and Watches, Tools, Small Appliances, Sporting Goods, Musical Instruments, Electronics, Clothing, and a general catch-all. The range of price points is wide — from a $119.98 Apple MacBook Air to a $3,499.99 Breitling Galactic automatic watch and a $999.99 14K white gold diamond ring — suggesting the shop accepts and resells items across the value spectrum, including name-brand luxury goods.

A notable feature is the no-fee layaway plan, which allows customers to take up to 12 months to pay off a purchase with just 10% down and no additional fees charged. This is meaningfully more flexible than many pawn shop competitors and makes higher-ticket items like jewelry and watches more accessible. Free shipping is available on orders over $50, with exceptions for freight shipping, Hawaii, and Alaska.

As an online storefront, Pawn Max's website focuses on the retail/resale side of the pawn business rather than prominently advertising pawn loan terms or rates, which are typically handled in-store. Consumers seeking specific loan terms, buyback policies, or appraisal services would need to contact the store directly. The inventory is pre-owned, so condition and availability will vary. Still, the combination of a broad product mix, luxury consignment, and a no-fee layaway option makes this a practical option for value-focused shoppers.
pros: No-fee layaway plan — no finance charges added
Up to 12 months to pay off layaway purchases
Low 10% down payment required to start layaway
Sells luxury items including Breitling watches and diamond jewelry at pawn prices
Online storefront with organized categories for remote browsing
Broad merchandise mix across 8 categories including electronics, tools, and musical instruments
cons: Pawn loan rates and terms are not disclosed on the website
All inventory is pre-owned — condition varies and stock is not guaranteed
Shipping excludes Hawaii and Alaska regardless of order size
Physical store address and hours not visible in the scraped website content
Single store location (Store 3) limits in-person access for most consumers
best_for: Bargain hunters seeking pre-owned luxury watches and jewelry at below-retail prices
Budget shoppers who need flexible payment terms via the no-fee layaway plan
Consumers looking for used electronics, tools, or sporting goods at reduced prices
Individuals wanting to pawn or sell valuables for quick collateral-based cash
diagnosis: Pawn Max Store 3 is best suited for value-conscious shoppers who want pre-owned luxury goods or everyday items and need flexible payment terms through the no-fee layaway plan. The main caveat is that pawn loan terms are not published online, so borrowers should call ahead to understand rates before using the collateral loan side of the business.
services: Pre-owned jewelry sales (including 14K gold and diamond pieces)
Pre-owned luxury watch sales (including brands like Breitling)
No-fee layaway plan (10% down, up to 12 months)
Used and pre-owned merchandise across general categories
